name: George Pataki
subject: Serious Times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/de154e9948/ace65cf3c9/15e1491ce4/sc=1203eb

Friend,

These are serious times. Islamic terrorism is on the rise, and we
have a president who refuses to confront it head-on.

We can't make the same mistake twice. We can't elect another
president who's not ready to lead this country and defeat the threat
of radical Islam.

That's why I'm asking for your support. Please join our campaign with
a -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/de154e9948/ace65cf3c9/4c9dfa86e1/sc=1203eb $2, $5, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 contribution
today.

Earlier today, I gave a speech about the threats we face, and how as
president I will work to defeat them. I hope you'll take a few
minutes to watch it by clicking -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/de154e9948/ace65cf3c9/c70022250d/c4564581/gov-pataki-rjc here.

With terrorism on the rise, we need a president who's prepared to
destroy it. I will be that president.

Thank you, and please help us with a generous contribution of -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/de154e9948/ace65cf3c9/49336e81a1/sc=1203eb $2, $5, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700.

George Pataki

name: Rand Paul
subject: Protect this country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
I don't think Americans should not be living
in fear.
Citizens should not be forfeiting their
liberty to the government under the false impression that that is
the only way to remain safe.
It's not. We have options.
I have introduced new legislation in the
Defend Our Capital Act of 2015 that will allow American citizens
to keep themselves safe -- and therefore keep this country safer.
This bill would remove existing restrictive
firearm ownership laws in the District of Columbia, and require
the District of Columbia to issue and grant reciprocity for
concealed weapons permits for both residents and non-residents.
It's a true embrace of the 2nd Amendment.
For too long the Americans who live in and
visit their nation's capital have been prevented from defending
themselves and their loved ones. No longer should our citizens
have to choose between safety or visiting Washington, D.C.
This legislation will immediately improve the
security of our country and the safety of those visiting the
Capitol by:

Requiring the District of Columbia to
begin issuing concealed weapons permits for both residents and
non-residents.

Allowing for national reciprocity of
conceal and carry weapons permits between states and for carry by
active duty military.

Allowing for the carrying of firearms on
public, non-sensitive areas of federal property.

Allowing for the purchase of firearms
across state lines.

It is not the time to expand the role of
government and further crush the individual liberties of the
private citizen.
Now is the time to stand strong for the
security of our country and make certain that protections are in
place to make sure what happened in Paris does not happen here in
America.
Will you stand with me in support of our
right to arm ourselves?
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Ben Carson
subject: This is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| _**
**_ |
---

Peter, that was a headline from CNN the other day.
For some reason, the media and the political class in our country just don't understand me.

Perhaps they just don't want to.

**[But I think you understand me just fine. In fact, I think we're probably very much alike, and now more than ever, I need you to re-commit to this fight we've undertaken together.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049615:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r)**

This is who I am -- I'm a proud American. I believe in God and the Judeo-Christian values upon which our nation was founded. I detest political correctness, because the truth matters more.

As a people, we've allowed ourselves to be bullied by a dishonest media and a permanent political class. We're not supposed to use certain words or talk about certain subjects because somewhere, someone might be offended.

I'm running for President to beat back this dangerous trend.

I want to revive America's exceptional spirit and re-establish a government that is truly of, by and for the people.

For months and months, I've spoken with hundreds of thousands of my fellow Americans, sharing my story, my heart, and my solutions for America.

I'll be honest, it's been difficult. I've never seen a media so intent on twisting my words and misleading those who they're supposed to serve -- the American public.

**So here's where I'd like to enlist your help -- and I need it now more than ever.

****The Iowa Caucuses are on February 1st.** Decisions will be made and people will begin to vote for our next President. It may seem like a long way off, but it will be here before we know it.

**My campaign is in the midst of reserving airtime so we can run ads on TV and get my message directly to the people who matter most -- the voters.**

It's time to bypass the filter of the media, and only you can help me do it.

**[Even if it's just $5 or $10, please help us get on TV by making a secure donation now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049615:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r) **

**Together we've built a movement of millions. Now it's time to show what we can do. Now is the time when it really counts.**

America was supposed to be a land of citizen-statesmen. Government wasn't meant to consume us or be involved in every aspect of our lives.

I'm running for President because I'm concerned about the future we are leaving our children and grandchildren, and I believe that working with you I can get us back on the right track.

**[If you believe in me and in our shared vision for a more hopeful America, I ask you to dig deep and make a donation now. I literally cannot do this without you.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049615:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r)
**
Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049615:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049616:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049617:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049618:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049619:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32049620:sUSS7Vy-N:m:1:876315805:1FCF3710FC10F976CD85FBA223C16648:r)
---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media
Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

name: Austin Chambers, EricGreitens.com
subject: Your Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Dear Peter,

I'll get straight to the point - we're under attack and we need
your help right now! The Missouri Democratic party released an
attack ad against Eric just this week.

Your investment of $16 is needed right now to help us fight back.
Can I tell Eric that you're standing with us?
https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/your-help
The establishment in both parties is working overtime to defeat
Eric because they know he'll put an end to their special interest
games. The last thing the establishment wants as governor is a
conservative outsider like Eric. That's why John Brunner and
Missouri Democrats are practically teaming up, trying to stop our
momentum. But it's already backfiring on them.

Join our team today to help defeat these insiders who are
desperate to protect their power --
https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/your-help

On to Victory,

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

name: Team Jeb
subject: 2x the entries
body:
Friend, we were looking through our list of contest entrants for Dinner with Jeb, and noticed you haven't entered to win yet. We have to admit, we're a little surprised. Do you want to meet Jeb?

There's no better way to get to know our next President than sitting down for dinner with him, so we have a special offer for you.

[**If you chip in $1 or more before midnight, we 'll enter your name twice. That means you'll have double the chances of winning an all-expenses paid trip to meet Jeb on the campaign trail.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uqqbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjwhgwm_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pqhtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgjhyjv_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

What do you have to lose? We're covering your flight, hotel and dinner -- all you have to do is chip in $1 by midnight: [**Jeb2016.com/Dinner-with-Jeb-Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cmmrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsptggh_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

So what do you say, want to grab a bite with the next President, Friend? **Then take the simple step and chip in $1 or more and enter twice:**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tpjfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrthlbbl_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Good luck,

Team Jeb

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=6176&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb-donate/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb/). Entries are limited to 50 per person. Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Tuesday, November 17, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Standard Time and ends on Thursday, December 31, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Standard Time on Thursday, December 31, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; dinner with Jeb Bush at one of the area restaurants, with an approximate retail value of $100; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,825. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Mike DuHaime
subject: New polls - and it's great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
|
| | | Good afternoon, _**New Polls Out**_ \- After a round of key endorsements this week in New Hampshire, and across the country, there are two new polls out in the last 24 hours and they bring good news for Governor Christie and the campaign. Here is what you need to know:
* PPP just released a New Hampshire poll which shows Governor Christie has moved up 5 spots in the last six weeks, and he is now in 4th place with 10% support.
* Governor Christie is in a virtual tie with Senator Rubio and ahead of Ben Carson, Carly Fiorina, Senator Paul, Governor Bush, and Governor Kasich.
* Governor Christie's fav/unfav in New Hampshire is 61/22 (+39). _He has the best favorability rating of any Republican candidate in New Hampshire._
* CNN also just released a new national poll which shows Governor Christie now in the top 5 nationally and ahead of Governor Bush, Governor Kasich, Carly Fiorina, and Senator Paul.

**[_Boston Globe_ \- Christie may have tools to take Trump on in N.H.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230302:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r)**
[**_Yahoo! Politics_ \- Christie is getting his moment. The question is whether he can make it last.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230303:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r) _**On The Ballot**_ - Also important to note, the Christie team collected over 10,000 petition signatures to get Governor Christie on the Virginia presidential primary ballot. He is now on the ballot in 20 states and counting: Alabama, Alaska, Arizona, Arkansas, Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Louisiana, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, Nevada, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Tennessee, Utah, Vermont, and Virginia. _**News**_ - After the events in California, Governor Christie gave a serious speech about understanding the threat of terrorism and the dire need for law enforcement to have every tool available to intervene and prevent attacks from happening both at home and around the world. **[Christie: We Need To Come To Grips With The Idea That We Are In The Midst Of The Next World War](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230304:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r)** _" As a nation, we've become complacent and soft and unwilling to do the difficult things that need to be done to do the first thing that any president of the United States must do when he takes his hand off that Bible on January 20th, 2017, and that is to protect the lives and the security of the American people, and that is exactly what I'll do when I take my hand off that bible."_ **[_Atlantic_ \- Christie "spoke about the Middle East morass in an assured and informed way"](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230305:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r)** _" All of this study is helping him seem like a more plausible candidate than he once seemed, though it is his assertiveness and pugnacity that serve him especially well in moments of national nervousness. Christie is well-positioned to be the break-glass-in-case-of-emergency candidate--his experience in crisis management (it was his leadership when Hurricane Sandy hit that truly made him a national figure), and his years as a federal prosecutor in post-9/11 New Jersey, have drawn the approving attention of the Manchester Union-Leader, which recently endorsed him; George Will; and other influential Republicans looking for a plausible alternative to Donald Trump."_ **[_Washington Post_ \- Right Turn - Christie shows his national security bona fides](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230306:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r)
[Fox News - Christie: We Need To Give Law Enforcement The Tools They Need To Intervene](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230307:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r)** Christie is back in Iowa this weekend and then heads back to New Hampshire next week. We are just 59 days away from the Iowa caucuses and 67 days away from the New Hampshire primary. Have a great weekend, Mike
---

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45230308:6yNgOXLaN:m:1:1516426255:054310A85C588E23B44248E12C643D96:r)

clean_body: | | | ---|--- | | | | Good afternoon, New Polls Out \- After a round of key endorsements this week in New Hampshire, and across the country, there are two new polls out in the last 24 hours and they bring good news for Governor Christie and the campaign. Here is what you need to know: PPP just released a New Hampshire poll which shows Governor Christie has moved up 5 spots in the last six weeks, and he is now in 4th place with 10% support. Governor Christie is in a virtual tie with Senator Rubio and ahead of Ben Carson, Carly Fiorina, Senator Paul, Governor Bush, and Governor Kasich. Governor Christie's fav/unfav in New Hampshire is 61/22 (+39). He has the best favorability rating of any Republican candidate in New Hampshire. CNN also just released a new national poll which shows Governor Christie now in the top 5 nationally and ahead of Governor Bush, Governor Kasich, Carly Fiorina, and Senator Paul. On The Ballot - Also important to note, the Christie team collected over 10,000 petition signatures to get Governor Christie on the Virginia presidential primary ballot. He is now on the ballot in 20 states and counting: Alabama, Alaska, Arizona, Arkansas, Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Louisiana, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, Nevada, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Tennessee, Utah, Vermont, and Virginia. News - After the events in California, Governor Christie gave a serious speech about understanding the threat of terrorism and the dire need for law enforcement to have every tool available to intervene and prevent attacks from happening both at home and around the world. " As a nation, we've become complacent and soft and unwilling to do the difficult things that need to be done to do the first thing that any president of the United States must do when he takes his hand off that Bible on January 20th, 2017, and that is to protect the lives and the security of the American people, and that is exactly what I'll do when I take my hand off that bible." " All of this study is helping him seem like a more plausible candidate than he once seemed, though it is his assertiveness and pugnacity that serve him especially well in moments of national nervousness. Christie is well-positioned to be the break-glass-in-case-of-emergency candidate--his experience in crisis management (it was his leadership when Hurricane Sandy hit that truly made him a national figure), and his years as a federal prosecutor in post-9/11 New Jersey, have drawn the approving attention of the Manchester Union-Leader, which recently endorsed him; George Will; and other influential Republicans looking for a plausible alternative to Donald Trump." Christie is back in Iowa this weekend and then heads back to New Hampshire next week. We are just 59 days away from the Iowa caucuses and 67 days away from the New Hampshire primary. Have a great weekend, Mike | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc. Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. You can view this email in your web browser . P.O. Box 9119 Morristown, NJ 07963 (973) 936-9318

name: STOP Pat Toomey
subject: Late last night
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

Wanted to be sure you saw the email below. Late last night, Republican Pat Toomey voted with his Washington allies to strip Medicaid coverage from hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians. Not just that, but he also voted to repeal affordable health care and entirely defund Planned Parenthood.

This cannot stand. Five years ago, voters sent Pat Toomey to Washington to stand up for their interests and represent their families. His actions this week prove definitively that he is more interested in catering to Republican leaders than in standing with everyday Americans who need his help in protecting their health care coverage.

Chip in $5 here to help us stop Pat Toomey and elect Katie McGinty: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20151204&refcode2=e20151204nd&amount=5

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20151204&refcode2=e20151204nd&amount=5

Now more than ever, we need Katie in the Senate fighting for us. Republicans are banding together to gut coverage and deny women access to health care, and we need Katie to stand up for us and promote our best interests in Washington.

STOP Pat Toomey

---- Original message ----
From: STOP Pat Toomey
Subject: BREAKING VOTE: Senate strips health care

BREAKING: Pat Toomey votes to strip health care from 450,000 Pennsylvanians
RUSH $5 to dump Toomey and elect Katie now >>
https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20151204&refcode2=e20151204nd&amount=5

Friend --

Just minutes ago, Pat Toomey voted yes on a Senate bill to REPEAL Obamacare and strip Medicaid away from 450,000 Pennsylvanians.

We need to show Pat Toomey RIGHT NOW that we're ready for a leader who fights to expand health care access, not repeal it! RUSH $5 or whatever you can to dump Pat Toomey and help elect Katie McGinty.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20151204&refcode2=e20151204nd&amount=5

Under Governor Wolf's leadership, we've expanded Medicaid access so that 600,000 more Pennsylvanians have access to affordable health care. Now, Pat Toomey has voted to strip away health care from hundreds of thousands of our neighbors -- without any plan for replacing that desperately needed coverage.

Republican Pat Toomey is promoting his rigid partisan ideology instead of fighting to protect the families he was elected to serve. It's despicable, and we're fed up with his five years of failed leadership.

If you're ready for a senator who will stand up for health care and support hardworking families, make an immediate donation to Katie's campaign here.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20151204&refcode2=e20151204nd&amount=5

Thank you,

STOP Pat Toomey

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/1192594186239475712/702582432590725120.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: Re: BREAKING NEWS:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Did you see Chris's email, friend? This is serious.

Outside Super PAC money is pouring into Maryland, and it could really hurt our campaign. We have to stand up and fight back, but we can't do it without your immediate help.

Getting dark money out of politics is the only way to protect the voices of the people. **[Give today and let's show them we're a people-first campaign.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/396708c/260057532/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120315&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Give+today+and+letrsquos+show+them+wersq&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**

Sheila

Begin forwarded message:

| **BREAKING** : _The Washington Post_ reports an outside Super PAC plans to spend $1 MILLION against us in just the coming weeks. They are _**already**_ on the air right now. **[Urgent rapid response funds needed>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/396708d/260057532/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120315&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Urgent+rapid+response+funds+needed+gtgtg&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
---

Friend,

It's started, friend. Right now, an outside Super PAC is flooding the airwaves here in Maryland with misleading ads for my opponent. For years, I've been leading the fight against dark money in politics, and here it is right on our doorstep. In July, I put forward an Elizabeth Warren-style pledge to keep dark money out of Maryland -- but my opponent refused to sign it. We can't let outside Super PACs define this election.

That's where you come in: we are on the verge of breaking a grassroots record.

We just need 35 more donors from Silver Spring to send a strong message that Maryland voters won't just sit by and let this happen.

**[Will you join us and make a donation right now? Our grassroots supporters like you are our best defense against outside Super PACs.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/396708a/260057532/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120315&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+join+us+and+make+a+donation+rig&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
**[Donate $15 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/396708b/260057532/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em120315&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+15+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
**[Donate $35 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/3967088/260057532/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em120315&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+35+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
**[Donate $50 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/3967089/260057532/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em120315&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+50+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
**[Donate $100 right now>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/3967086/260057532/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em120315&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+100+right+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
**[Or, donate another amount](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/3967087/260057532/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120315&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**
As I write this email, voters in parts of our state are being inundated with these ads, supported by outside, dark money. It just isn't right. We can't allow special interests to have such an outsized influence over our elections.

**[Click here to contribute and let's show these outside Super PACs that Marylanders won't let their elections be hijacked by outside money!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/3967084/260057532/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dark-money-ads?refcode=em120315&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Click+here+to+contribute+and+letrsquos+s&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315")**

Thanks,

Chris

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c2c/70cdc2ba/47bd022b/3967085/260057532/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em120315&source=em120315") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: let me know you're in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Can you chip in before December 31st? | Friend --

If you’re with me, I need you to step up this month.

I'm not going to waste a single minute of the rest of 2015: My schedule is packed with town halls, meetings, events, and rallies (and I'm excited for it!). I'm ready to earn every vote and win the Democratic nomination, the presidency, and make history.

**[But I can't do it alone. If you're with me, all you have to do is chip in $1 right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Your donation isn't about closing a hole in our budget. It's about showing me you're on my side when it counts the most. With candidates on both sides of the aisle smearing my name and voters going to the polls in less than eight weeks, I need to know if you're in it to win it.

I'm going to ask you to do so much over the next few weeks and months: I hope you'll volunteer, talk to your friends and family about why this race matters, wear your Team Hillary shirt proudly, and when it comes time, that you'll vote in your state's primary or caucus.

**But today, all I need to know you're on my side is $1. Let me know you're in:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjQxNjM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNDMwMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
I have a few thoughts on what true national
security is, how we achieve it, and the abysmal record of one of
my opponents in this area.
The first job of the President should be to
secure our borders and fix broken refugee and visa systems to
stop terrorists.
This President has utterly failed at the job.
I have led, and proposed measures to fix the
problems.
But as I led, Marco Rubio has gone the other
way, preferring open borders, broken systems and siding with
Harry Reid and Chuck Schumer.
If you want policies that keep us safe and
keep us free, please make a contribution to my campaign today.

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Yesterday I introduced my SECURE bill as an
amendment in the Senate, to protect our borders and resources.
Marco Rubio voted no.
During his Gang of 8 bill, I proposed the
toughest border security/refugee-visa reform measures in my Trust
but Verify Amendment.
Marco Rubio voted against my border security
and refugee/visa reform measures then too, leaving us less safe.
And as far back as the FL legislature, Marco
Rubio opposed toughening reporting requirements at Florida
colleges for those on student visas.
This is nothing new, it is a pattern through
his entire career.
I want to secure our borders, fix our broken
systems. Marco Rubio opposes.
National security requires it. And it should
be a test for the next President.
Support real border security and halt to
refugee/visas.
For years on this important national security
test, I have led, and Marco Rubio has failed.

Stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/istKtXVyON

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ostKtXVyON

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-30863142626-echo3-2A653EFAF75CFDBDE0404306C163B5C3@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----
http://www.paramountcommunication.com

And it should be a test for the next President. Support real border security and halt to refugee/visas. For years on this important national security test, I have led, and Marco Rubio has failed. Stand with me today. In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
